entities.cat: a cat crouching on the table
entities.fishbowl: a fishbowl at the edge of the table

scenes.title: The Fishbowl
scenes.background_prompt: A living room side table with a round glass fishbowl, a lace doily, a lamp, and a couch nearby. Afternoon light from a window. No animals, no fish in the bowl.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A living room in quiet afternoon light. A round glass fishbowl sits on a wooden side table covered with a white lace doily. Inside the fishbowl, a small orange goldfish swims in lazy circles. A gray and white cat has silently leapt onto the table and crouches beside the fishbowl in a hunting pose — body low, haunches raised, eyes wide and locked on the fish with predatory intensity, one paw extended slightly toward the bowl. The fishbowl sits dangerously close to the edge of the table. The fish seems oblivious, continuing its loops. A floor lamp with a cream shade casts warm light over the scene. A beige couch with throw pillows sits nearby. The room is peaceful except for this moment of impending mischief.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place cat on the side table next to the fishbowl, crouching in hunting pose, body low, haunches raised, eyes wide and locked on the fish, one paw extended. Place fishbowl near the edge of the table with a small orange goldfish swimming inside.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left corner of the foreground, a small patch of green grass and clover grows, featuring tiny white, yellow, and purple flowers. The floor is made of polished light brown wooden planks that run diagonally toward the right. A rectangular tan woven rug with a fringed border sits on the floor, partially tucked under a dark brown wooden side table. Moving to the middle ground on the left, a window with a white frame is framed by a cream-colored curtain adorned with a green leaf pattern. A ginger tabby cat with orange stripes and green eyes is positioned behind the window sill, leaning its front paws onto the left edge of the wooden table and looking intently toward the center. The dark brown wooden table is covered with a white lace doily. On top of the doily sits a round glass fishbowl filled with clear blue water, containing a single small orange goldfish swimming to the right, a sprig of green seaweed, and several small, multi-colored pebbles at the bottom. To the right of the fishbowl stands a table lamp with a dark brown, tiered base and a flared, cream-colored lampshade decorated with a golden scroll pattern; the lamp is illuminated, casting a warm yellow light. To the right of the table is a large, plush blue armchair with two matching blue cushions resting against its backrest. In the background, visible through the window, the scene depicts a bright, sunny day under a light blue sky with several fluffy white clouds. Large, rounded green trees with brown trunks are visible outdoors. The interior wall is a neutral beige color, and another matching patterned curtain hangs to the right of the window, partially obscured by the table and the lamp.

CH: a ginger tabby cat with orange stripes
a small orange goldfish in the bowl
S: a cozy living room during the day
a sunny view through the window
a wooden table with a lace doily
IE: the cat notices the swimming goldfish
the cat reaches up toward the table
IR: the cat looks focused on the fish
P: the cat wants to reach the fishbowl
the cat plans to climb the table
A: the cat is peeking over the edge
the goldfish is swimming in circles
the lamp is glowing with warm light

ENP: a round glass fishbowl with blue water
a ginger cat with green eyes
